name: Zuzugsfreibetrag - High income researcher (EUR 6,000/month x 14)
description: Researcher earning EUR 84,000 with 30% Zuzugsfreibetrag tax relief, standard region

sources.description: Manually calculated: 30% ZZFB reduces taxable fraction to 70%, SV on full gross. Compared to base case net of EUR 53,887 - saving of ~EUR 8,856
